body:
This PR adds [Aqua](https://github.com/JuliaTesting/Aqua.jl) tests, specifically, `Aqua.test_unbound_args(ClimaCore)`, which tests that no functions defined in ClimaCore run into [this julia issue](https://github.com/JuliaLang/julia/issues/29393).

Adding this test revealed 9 instances of this issue, and the PR also includes fixes so that we pass all of the tests.
title: Add and fix Aqua tests

body:
Currently produces a lot of noise

- [ ] Unit tests are included OR N/A.
- [ ] Code is exercised in an integration test OR N/A.
- [ ] Documentation has been added/updated OR N/A.
title: Don't run formatter suggestions on draft PRs
